news.title:
Sensex, Nifty fell sharply Monday, wiping ₹15 Lakh Cr due to crude oil surge.
Oil-sensitive stocks like HPCL, BPCL, IOC dropped 6%; global indices also impacted.
news.summary:
Sensex, Nifty fell sharply Monday, wiping ₹15 Lakh Cr due to crude oil surge.
Oil-sensitive stocks like HPCL, BPCL, IOC dropped 6%; global indices also impacted.

news.title:
IOCL, HPCL, BPCL fell up to 9% after UBS downgraded stocks.
Downgrade follows crude price surge amid US-Israel-Iran conflict.
news.summary:

Downgrade follows crude price surge amid US-Israel-Iran conflict.

news.title:
Indian Oil, BPCL, HPCL raise LPG cylinder prices as Iran war disrupts supplies.
Commercial LPG cylinder prices increase to ₹1,883; India urges refiners to boost production.
news.summary:
Indian Oil, BPCL, HPCL raise LPG cylinder prices as Iran war disrupts supplies.
Commercial LPG cylinder prices increase to ₹1,883; India urges refiners to boost production.

news.title:
India uses emergency powers for LPG output; refiners directed to maximize production.
India seeks LPG supplies from the US, Canada; serves over 33 crore consumers.
news.summary:
India uses emergency powers for LPG output; refiners directed to maximize production.
India seeks LPG supplies from the US, Canada; serves over 33 crore consumers.

news.title:
Indian refiners, including Mangalore Refinery and HPCL, buy Russian oil rapidly after US eases curbs.
Millions of barrels in Asian waters address West Asia supply crunch effectively.
news.summary:

news.title:
Govt directs IOCL, BPCL, HPCL to boost LPG production using propane, butane to ensure adequate supply.
Directive aims to enhance energy security, reduce imports, but challenges include facility upgrades and balancing commitments.
news.summary:

news.title:
Reliance, IOC, BPCL, HPCL stocks may rise as US permits India to buy stranded Russian oil.
US grants 30-day waiver for Indian refiners to ease oil supply pressures amid Middle East tensions.
news.summary:
Reliance, IOC, BPCL, HPCL stocks may rise as US permits India to buy stranded Russian oil.

news.title:
India gets a 30-day US waiver to buy Russian crude stranded at sea.
This offers temporary relief to refiners amid Middle East supply disruptions.
news.summary:
India gets a 30-day US waiver to buy Russian crude stranded at sea.
This offers temporary relief to refiners amid Middle East supply disruptions.

news.title:
Citi warns India's gas value chain faces risks due to US-Iran war, impacting LNG suppliers like Petronet, GAIL, and Gujarat Gas.
ONGC benefits from higher oil prices; Reliance Industries gains in refining margins. IOC, HPCL, BPCL shares drop 3-4% on Monday.
news.summary:
Citi warns India's gas value chain faces risks due to US-Iran war, impacting LNG suppliers like Petronet, GAIL, and Gujarat Gas.
ONGC benefits from higher oil prices; Reliance Industries gains in refining margins. IOC, HPCL, BPCL shares drop 3-4% on Monday.

news.title:
Strait of Hormuz disruption impacts global oil supply chains, New Delhi monitors oil stocks closely.
State-run refiners have 25 days of crude oil and 25 days of petrol/diesel stocks.
news.summary:

news.title:
IOC, BPCL, HPCL face margin pressure as Brent crude hits $82/bbl due to geopolitical tensions.
Iran's Strait of Hormuz closure threat may worsen crude supply issues; JM Financial sees HPCL most affected.
news.summary:

news.title:
India unlikely to hike petrol, diesel prices despite crude nearing $80 amid Iran conflict.
Brent crude climbed close to $80; oil prices rose ~9% after US-Israel strikes on Iran.
news.summary:

news.title:
HPCL confirmed interest payment of Rs 127.7 Cr for NCDs (ISIN INE094A08150).
The payment was made on the due date, March 2, 2026, per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:

Affected sectors include infrastructure, aviation, energy, logistics, consumer goods, and pharmaceuticals.

news.title:
ATF rates hiked by Rs 5,215/KL, reaching Rs 96,638.14/KL in Delhi, impacting airlines' costs amid summer travel demand.
PSU OMCs revised rates due to rising crude oil prices; Brent crude now at $78/barrel, 8% above Dec 2025 lows.
news.summary:

news.title:

OMCs' valuations remain constrained despite strong Q3 performance; Brent above $70 adds macro risks.

Firms focus on boosting domestic production and refining capacities aggressively.

news.title:
Indian equity markets fell sharply, ending a three-session gain streak due to US-Iran tensions.
Tata Investment, Newgen, and other key stocks showed significant movement amid broad-based sell-off.
news.summary:

news.title:
Indian OMCs' shares, including BPCL, HPCL, and IOC, fell as Brent crude surged above $70/b amid Middle East tensions.
BPCL dropped 2.3%, HPCL 2.8%, and IOC 1.96%. Crude rose 4% with supply concerns and geopolitical instability fueling market sentiment.
news.summary:
Indian OMCs' shares, including BPCL, HPCL, and IOC, fell as Brent crude surged above $70/b amid Middle East tensions.
BPCL dropped 2.3%, HPCL 2.8%, and IOC 1.96%. Crude rose 4% with supply concerns and geopolitical instability fueling market sentiment.
